objects.name: v_spaceship_aum
objects.uc_comment: Daily per-user Assets Under Management (FUM) across Spaceship, an Australian investment platform acquired by eToro. Spaceship has four products: (1) Super — superannuation/retirement accounts, identified by member_id mapped to user_id via user_beta; (2) Voyager — ETF managed funds with 5 portfolios (EARTH, EXPLORER, GALAXY have NAV=0; ORIGIN and UNIVERSE have NAV>0); (3) Nova — stock trading, timestamps in UTC (must convert to Australia/Sydney); (4) Money — cash wallet used as the gateway for Voyager/Nova purchases (NOT included in this AUM view). GOTCHAS: (a) All source amounts are in AUD; USD columns use the AUD/USD mid-rate from fact_currencypricewithsplit (InstrumentID=7). (b) Super and Voyager balance tables are weekday-only — Sat/Sun are fill-forwarded from Friday. Nova is 7-day. (c) user_id deduplication is critical — user_beta has 1:many member_id to user_id; this view uses the canonical (lowest) user_id per member. (d) Cross-sell linkage to eToro is via main.bi_db.bronze_sub_accounts_accounts (providerName=Spaceship), joining on contact.user_id = accountId to gcid. Granularity: one row per date x user_id.

columns.name: date
columns.comment: Calendar date including weekends. Super and Voyager balances are fill-forwarded from Friday for Sat/Sun since source tables are weekday-only.

columns.name: date_id
columns.comment: Date in YYYYMMDD integer format for partition-friendly filtering.

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: Canonical Spaceship user_id, deduplicated via member_canonical (Super) and user_id_map (Voyager/Nova) to resolve 1:many member_id mappings.

columns.name: gcid
columns.comment: eToro Global Customer ID from the sub_accounts bridge table (providerName=Spaceship). NULL if the user has no eToro cross-sell linkage.

columns.name: super_balance_aud
columns.comment: Superannuation closing balance in AUD. Weekend values are fill-forwarded from last weekday (Friday).

columns.name: voyager_balance_aud
columns.comment: Voyager managed fund balance in AUD (sum across all portfolios: EARTH, EXPLORER, GALAXY, ORIGIN, UNIVERSE). Weekend fill-forwarded.

columns.name: nova_balance_aud
columns.comment: Nova stock trading balance in AUD. Available 7 days/week from source — no fill-forward needed.

columns.name: total_balance_aud
columns.comment: Sum of super_balance_aud + voyager_balance_aud + nova_balance_aud. Does NOT include Money wallet balances.

columns.name: super_balance_usd
columns.comment: Super balance converted to USD using AUD/USD mid-rate ((Ask+Bid)/2) from fact_currencypricewithsplit (InstrumentID=7).

columns.name: voyager_balance_usd
columns.comment: Voyager balance converted to USD using same AUD/USD mid-rate.

columns.name: nova_balance_usd
columns.comment: Nova balance converted to USD using same AUD/USD mid-rate.

columns.name: total_balance_usd
columns.comment: Total balance (Super+Voyager+Nova) in USD. Excludes Money wallet.

columns.name: is_funded
columns.comment: TRUE when total_balance_aud > 0, indicating the user holds a positive balance across any product.

objects.name: v_spaceship_fees
objects.uc_comment: Fee revenue by product, user, and day across all Spaceship fee types. Spaceship is an Australian investment platform with five fee streams: (1) Super — admin/member fees from super_transactions (type=Fees). Excludes the one-off SFT event on 2024-05-18. (2) Voyager (account) — account-level fees from voyager_account_fees, keyed by account_fee_created_at_date. (3) Voyager (mgmt) — daily management fees pro-rated to each user by their balance share of portfolio NAV. For portfolios with NAV>0 (ORIGIN, UNIVERSE): user_fee = total_fee x (user_balance / NAV). For portfolios with NAV=0 (EARTH, EXPLORER, GALAXY): falls back to SUM(user_balance) as denominator. (4) Nova (platform) — platform fees from nova_fees, keyed by coverage_start_date. (5) Nova (FX) — foreign-exchange spread fees from nova_transactions (order_fx_aud_fee on finalised orders). GOTCHAS: (a) All source amounts are AUD; USD uses AUD/USD mid-rate from fact_currencypricewithsplit (InstrumentID=7). (b) Voyager mgmt fees accrue daily including weekends, but the balance table is weekday-only. Weekend fees use fill-forwarded Friday balances for the pro-rating denominator (~7-8K AUD/day would be lost without this). (c) The pro-rating window must partition by fee date, NOT balance lookup date. Since fill-forward maps Fri+Sat+Sun fees to the same Friday balance rows, partitioning by balance date triples the denominator for NAV=0 portfolios (~968 AUD/day error). (d) Nova FX order_filled_at is UTC — must convert to Australia/Sydney before DATE cast, otherwise trades after ~2pm UTC land one day early vs Metabase. Granularity: one row per date x product x user_id.

columns.name: date
columns.comment: Fee accrual date. Nova FX uses order_filled_at converted from UTC to Australia/Sydney. Voyager mgmt weekend fees retain the actual fee date even though the balance lookup falls back to Friday.

columns.name: date_id
columns.comment: Date in YYYYMMDD integer format.

columns.name: product
columns.comment: Fee category: Super (admin fees from super_transactions), Voyager (account) (from voyager_account_fees), Voyager (mgmt) (pro-rated management fees), Nova (platform) (from nova_fees), or Nova (FX) (from nova_transactions FX spread).

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: Canonical Spaceship user_id (deduplicated).

columns.name: gcid
columns.comment: eToro Global Customer ID. NULL if no cross-sell linkage.

columns.name: total_fees_aud
columns.comment: Absolute total fees in AUD. Voyager mgmt fees are pro-rated: user_fee = total_fee x (user_balance / portfolio_NAV). For zero-NAV portfolios (EARTH, EXPLORER, GALAXY), falls back to SUM(user_balance) as denominator. Excludes Super SFT event (2024-05-18).

columns.name: total_fees_usd
columns.comment: Total fees converted to USD via AUD/USD mid-rate ((Ask+Bid)/2 from fact_currencypricewithsplit, InstrumentID=7).

columns.name: resubmission_confirmation
samples: Long term investments have changed to invest over many years
This is a start to an investment, looking to put in low value to support companies which have better impacts on the planet.

I want diverse portfolios one of each and will use them in accordance with the recommendations, this portfolio aligns with my current goals the most I just didn’t know your policies at the time I applied would have me rejected from having this one.
For future return investment deposit $50. For Me To Be King David
Misread description as I was distracted. This portfolio suits me.

objects.name: spaceship_metabase_voyager_product_balances_beta
objects.uc_comment: The table contains data related to user portfolios and their associated balances over time. It includes information on user IDs, product IDs, and various balance metrics, such as unit and AUD balances. This data can be used to track portfolio performance, analyze user engagement with products, and assess the impact of fees and liquidations on user accounts. Use cases include monitoring changes in balances, identifying new or closed products, and evaluating the overall health of user portfolios.
